nasb.text: Indeed, your threshing will last for you until grape gathering, and grape gathering will last until sowing time. You will thus eat your food to the full and live securely in your land.

esv.text: Your threshing shall last to the time of the grape harvest, and the grape harvest shall last to the time for sowing. And you shall eat your bread to the full and dwell in your land securely.

cnv.text: 你們打禾，必打到摘葡萄的時候，摘葡萄必摘到撒種的時候；你們吃食物，吃得飽足，在你們的境內安然居住。

ccb.text: 你们要打粮食打到摘葡萄的时候，摘葡萄摘到播种的时候。你们必丰衣足食，安然居住。
